02-Sources/Books/The Society of Spectacle/Spectators are linked solely by their one-way relationship to the very center that keeps them isolated from each other. The spectacle thus reunites the separated, but it reunites them only in their separateness..md

02-Sources/Books/The Invention of Art/The fine art world recaptures acts of resistance and expands its own limits by assimilating new types of art and dissolving its own boundaries..md
02-Sources/Essays/AI Is Inherently Evil/AI is Inherently Evil.md
02-Sources/Essays/AI Is Inherently Evil/Notably, computers cannot quite simulate all material events, nor can they fully operate without prompting. However, their efficiency has no definite limit..md

02-Sources/Essays/AI Is Inherently Evil/Computers can store and transfer any information in valid symbolic logic. This allows them to represent any idea as information (immaterial), including representations of labor functions (universal) and of the operation of those functions (autonomous)..md

02-Sources/Essays/AI Is Inherently Evil/The three key attributes of technocapitalism are universality, autonomy, and immateriality; the extent to which any technology maximizes them is call efficiency..md

02-Sources/Essays/AI Is Inherently Evil/Capitalist technology tends to become universal, capable of performing all labor functions; autonomous, requiring no labor input to function; and immaterial, demanding no material expenses and no material output..md

02-Sources/Essays/AI Is Inherently Evil/Labor costs depend on the quantity and duration of labor. A company can reduce quantity of labor by using singular technologies to finish many tasks, or reduce the duration of labor by automating singular tasks that technology can perform..md

02-Sources/Essays/AI Is Inherently Evil/Material costs can only fall a fixed amount before the only savings come from reducing the amount of material used. The ultimate savings limit occurs once the product consists of no materials, meaning it consist only of reference to those materials..md
